tasks.subject: Task 1: pkg/branding foundation
tasks.description:
configx.Branding + migration 017 (instance_settings singleton) + pkg/branding resolver (DB→config→default for name+icon, cache, Invalidate) + ProcessIcon (PNG 256) + embedded default icon. Export Store/Settings + New/NewWithStore.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/configx/configx.go","db/migrations/017_instance_settings.sql","pkg/branding/branding.go","pkg/branding/store_pg.go","pkg/branding/default_icon.go","pkg/branding/default_icon.png","pkg/branding/branding_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/branding/... && go build -tags nodynamic ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["Branding.InstanceName defaults Prohibitorum","migration 017 single-row instance_settings","InstanceName precedence DB→config→default","Icon precedence + HasCustomIcon","ProcessIcon square 256 PNG + etag; rejects >5MiB/garbage","Invalidate reloads","Store/Settings exported + NewWithStore"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Server wiring + public /config + /branding/icon
tasks.description:
Construct s.branding in NewServer; public GET /api/prohibitorum/config (PublicConfig JSON) + GET /branding/icon (PNG + ETag/304 + Cache-Control); register AuthPublic.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/server.go","pkg/server/handle_branding.go","pkg/server/handle_branding_test.go","pkg/contract/auth.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/server/ -run Branding -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["/config returns {instanceName,hasCustomIcon,iconUrl,iconEtag}","/branding/icon image/png + ETag + 304","default serves embedded PNG etag=default"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Admin settings endpoints (name + icon)
tasks.description:
PUT /admin/settings {instanceName} (sudo wrapper, 1-64), PUT /admin/settings/icon (registerOpHTTP admin + in-handler requireFreshSudo + 5MiB raw body), DELETE /admin/settings/icon (sudo wrapper); audit + branding.Invalidate.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/handle_admin_settings.go","pkg/server/handle_admin_settings_test.go","pkg/server/server.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/server/ -run 'AdminSettings|AdminMutationRoutesRequireSudo' -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["PUT name sets DB (empty reverts)+audit+invalidate; >64→400","PUT icon admin+manual sudo+5MiB; bad→400","DELETE icon clears+audit","name PUT+icon DELETE in sudo-routes guard; icon PUT sudo in-handler"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: webui title templating
tasks.description:
index.html <title>__INSTANCE_NAME__</title>; webui.Handler(instanceName) escapes+replaces; server.go passes config name; webui_test; hand-edit committed dist/index.html title pre-rebuild.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/index.html","pkg/webui/webui.go","pkg/server/server.go","pkg/webui/webui_test.go","pkg/webui/dist/index.html"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/webui/... -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["index.html title placeholder","Handler(name) replaces escaped name","server.go passes config.Branding.InstanceName"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: SPA branding store + brand marks + favicon
tasks.description: stores/branding.ts (load /config; instanceName/hasCustomIcon/iconSrc), App.vue loads on boot, AppSidebar+CenteredLayout render name + ShieldCheck-or-, index.html favicon → /branding/icon. ```json:metadata {"files":["dashboard/src/stores/branding.ts","dashboard/src/stores/branding.test.ts","dashboard/src/App.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/AppSidebar.vue","dashboard/src/pages/CenteredLayout.vue","dashboard/index.html"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run test -- branding AppSidebar CenteredLayout","acceptanceCriteria":["store defaults Prohibitorum + load() + cache-busted iconSrc","sidebar+login show name; img when hasCustomIcon else ShieldCheck","favicon href /branding/icon"]} ```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Dynamic page titles
tasks.description:
lib/pageTitle.buildTitle + meta.titleKey on every route + router afterEach sets document.title via branding store + i18n; title.* keys en+zh.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/lib/pageTitle.ts","dashboard/src/lib/pageTitle.test.ts","dashboard/src/router/index.ts","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts","dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run test -- pageTitle locales","acceptanceCriteria":["buildTitle page+instance / instance-alone","every route meta.titleKey; afterEach sets title","title.* en+zh parity; no U+2019 in en.ts"]}
```

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/pages/admin/SettingsView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/SettingsView.test.ts","dashboard/src/router/index.ts","dashboard/src/components/custom/AppSidebar.vue","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts","dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run test -- SettingsView locales","acceptanceCriteria":["name save→withSudo PUT + branding.load()","icon upload→withSudo PUT file; remove→DELETE when custom","sidebar Settings item admin-gated","admin.settings.* en+zh parity"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Gate + runtime + dist rebuild

Full gate green; rebuild+commit pkg/webui/dist (placeholder present); runtime-verify via SUBAGENT server (chromium --dump-dom per-page titles, /config, /branding/icon PNG, custom name live); optional smoke /config+/branding/icon.
